problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
